attention1.ptxt: Road test should be carried out by 2 persons, a driver and a tester. Select a safe place where there is neither any traffic nor the possibility of any traffic accident. Be very careful during testing to avoid accidents.

item.ptxt: Before using scan tool, read its “Operator’s (Instruction) Manual” to know how to use it.
Be sure to clear all DTCs after completing troubleshooting.
Be sure to clear DTC after repair working.
